checklist.label: Consent, audit, and deletion readiness
checklist.details: Consent and artifact audit events exist; deletion remains runbook-managed.

checklist.label: Schema validation coverage
checklist.details: Latest package, blueprint, and evaluation run are schema-valid.

checklist.label: Safety non-goal enforcement
checklist.details: LLM/STT, credential collection, external execution, and code generation remain excluded.

checklist.label: Monitoring placeholder
checklist.details: M8 defines audit event monitoring placeholders without production deployment.

checklist.label: Support and deletion runbook
checklist.details: M8 provides support, deletion, and incident review runbook text.

checklist.label: Pilot metrics definition
checklist.details: M7 evaluation run defines deterministic pilot metric placeholders.

runbooks.support: Triage user-reported artifact issues through project audit events.
runbooks.deletion: Delete project-scoped artifacts and confirm deletion through an audit event.
runbooks.incident_review: Review safety or non-goal violations before enabling any later pilot.
